messages.message: Based on the provided context, Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the broad field of creating systems that can perform tasks requiring human intelligence. It was officially introduced at the Dartmouth Conference in 1956.

Based on the provided context, RAG stands for **Retrieval-Augmented Generation**. 

It is leveraged by ResearchMind AI to make document interaction faster, smarter, and more intuitive. By utilizing RAG (integrated using LangChain), the platform enables users to upload documents, search semantically, and receive context-aware answers grounded in their own data.
